HomePage.headline: An operating system for AI-native operations.
HomePage.subhead: ACM is the ops backbone for multi-agent fleets. Approvals, tool calls, heartbeats, quotas — all handled.
HomePage.forWhom: Built for indie hackers, AI-native operators, and platform teams evaluating build-vs-buy.

create.title: + Your AI Company
create.line1: PM Agent helps you build it
create.line2: Describe your workflow in plain language

Section2.title: You're here because...
Section2.subtitle: Three audiences benefit most from V1-A beta.

personaB.title: Platform teams evaluating build vs buy
personaB.desc: Multi-tenant + approval governance + self-deployable. No data lock-in.

personaC.title: AI educators & creators
personaC.desc: Workflow visualization + call receipts + tier quotas. Demo / teach without burning your wallet.

personaD.title: Indie operators on the road
personaD.desc: One-click deploy + heartbeat monitoring + error retry. Remove ops from your headspace.

Section3.title: Core capabilities
Section3.subtitle: Three-layer backbone + 5 official MCP servers preinstalled + 1300+ npm ecosystem.
Section3.cap1Desc: DAG topology + completion hook + edge conditions. e.g. customer query → risk approval → ticket creation, declaratively composed.
Section3.cap2Desc: tool-proxy interception + approval gate + tier quotas. High-risk actions go through human approval, low-risk pass through.
Section3.cap3Desc: heartbeat scheduler + cron. Run daily report agent at 9am; auto-alert on failure.
Section3.mcpFootnote: Install any npm/uv MCP server via mcp_installer with one click. Based on the official ModelContextProtocol package ecosystem (1300+ third-party servers available).

Footer.openCore: Open Core: free to self-host, pay only for cloud + tokens
